goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should 'arrive by 20:15' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on sunday
The train should arrive by 20:15 and should go to bishops stortford
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum and should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and phone number
